title: Vigna ringoetii
taxonomy: Vigna ringoetii is classified within the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Vigna, which includes a variety of legume species. Vigna ringoetii is further classified as a species within the subgenus Vigna. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf morphology and fruit structure. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Vigna ringoetii has a typical legume morphology.
uses: Vigna ringoetii is a species of legume, but unfortunately, I don't have specific information on its medicinal uses.
